articles.title: World’s 6th Largest Bank Is Blocking Bitcoin Transactions
articles.description: The world’s sixth-largest bank, HSBC, is blocking its customers from depositing from crypto wallets. Luckily, DeFi provides an alternative solution. HSBC Attempting to Quash Crypto HSBC and other UK banks are taking a tough stance against crypto. According to a report published by The Times on Saturday, HSBC has decided to block cryptocurrency payments. That includes preventing...

articles.title: Bitrue Raises Interest Rate on Polkadot Staking, Adds Cosmos Following VET and LINK
articles.description: Major crypto exchange Bitrue adds DOT and ATOM staking with a high interest rate, following the addition of VET, ZIL and LINK to its staking program

articles.title: Iota blockchain used to track COVID-19 test results at Frankfurt Airport
articles.description: Ubrich GmbH is providing a solution using Iota to the Frankfurt Airport coronavirus testing center.
